discovery_runs.question: What are the top 10 visitor management system websites or providers for an Australian business?
discovery_runs.summary: Ten visitor-management vendors commonly used or available to Australian businesses (mix of Australia-native providers and global vendors with Australian presence/support). Each entry is an official vendor website and supporting source links used to confirm product relevance to Australian customers.

candidates.name: Sine (Sine by Honeywell)
candidates.reason: Adelaide-founded, Australian-origin visitor & contractor management product now part of Honeywell — widely used in industrial, construction and enterprise sites across Australia.

discovery_sources.evidence_found: Official product pages describing visitor and contractor management and company positioning; clearly Australian roots noted on About pages.
About page describing origins in Adelaide, Australia and current Honeywell affiliation.

candidates.name: SwipedOn (includes Sign In App merger)
candidates.reason: iPad-first visitor sign-in with strong APAC uptake; recently merged with Sign In App to expand capabilities — has Australian/NZ focus and customers.

discovery_sources.evidence_found: Product pages describing visitor sign-in, kiosk apps and mentions of APAC/global customers and use cases.
Use-case and customer examples showing Australian/NZ commercial deployments.

candidates.name: WhosOnLocation (OnLocation / MRI OnLocation)
candidates.reason: People-presence platform (visitors, contractors, emergency/evacuation) with strong adoption in Australia and APAC; vendor materials and help docs show features tailored for contractor-heavy and multi-site organisations.

discovery_sources.evidence_found: Feature documentation for visitor, contractor and evacuation management — confirms product scope and enterprise features.
Regional product page describing OnLocation (WhosOnLocation) usage and Australian availability/hosting options.

candidates.name: Envoy
candidates.reason: One of the largest global visitor-management platforms (enterprise and multi-site); widely used for polished front-desk workflows, host notifications and integrations — supports Australian customers.

discovery_sources.evidence_found: Corporate product pages describing visitor management, enterprise features and integrations.
Detailed visitor-management feature list and enterprise positioning.

candidates.name: Proxyclick (now Eptura Visitor / Proxyclick)
candidates.reason: Enterprise-focused visitor-management solution (Proxyclick, now operating as Eptura Visitor in some channels) with strong global customers and deep access-control integrations — available to Australian businesses.

discovery_sources.evidence_found: Vendor press release describing Proxyclick platform capabilities and global deployments.
Notes Proxyclick (Eptura Visitor) positioning as enterprise-grade visitor management and mentions rebranding / acquisition history.

candidates.name: Traction Guest
candidates.reason: Enterprise-grade cloud VMS with strong compliance, ID-scanning and automation features — used globally and suitable for Australian organisations with complex security/compliance needs.

discovery_sources.source_name: Traction Guest – corporate press & product descriptions
discovery_sources.evidence_found: Press releases describing Traction Guest’s enterprise capabilities and integrations (Salesforce AppExchange) and global deployments.
Product expansion announcements showing enterprise feature set.

candidates.name: FacilityOS (formerly iLobby)
candidates.reason: Enterprise visitor and facility management (iLobby rebranded under FacilityOS) — strong in regulated industries, contractor workflows and integration with access control, suited for organisations needing compliance-first solutions.

discovery_sources.evidence_found: Official announcement and product descriptions confirming iLobby/FacilityOS visitor and security modules.
Historical and product positioning information verifying enterprise visitor-management features.

candidates.name: HID Global – EasyLobby Secure Visitor Management
candidates.reason: Enterprise and on-prem visitor management (EasyLobby SVM) offered by HID Global (which acquired EasyLobby) — commonly used where on-prem control and deep access-control integration are required (suitable for larger Australian sites needing on-prem solutions).

discovery_sources.evidence_found: Official product page describing EasyLobby SVM features, on-premises deployment and integrations.

discovery_sources.source_name: HID Global – visitor management solutions overview
discovery_sources.evidence_found: Solution overview and datasheets confirming EasyLobby positioning and enterprise use cases.

candidates.name: The Receptionist (Australia)
candidates.reason: iPad kiosk-based visitor-management vendor with a dedicated Australian site/pricing and regional support — practical for small-to-medium Australian businesses wanting a packaged iPad solution.

discovery_sources.evidence_found: Official Australian product pages and Australian pricing confirming local availability and support.
Australian pricing plans (AUD) and local shipping/hardware notes.

candidates.name: LoopSafe (Australia)
candidates.reason: Australian-built visitor-management and screening product (focus on health & safety, screening and aged-care use-cases) — useful for Australian businesses wanting locally-built solutions and data residency options.

discovery_sources.evidence_found: Vendor product pages describing visitor screening, document validation and Australian use-cases (aged care, healthcare).
Company profile referencing LoopSafe as an Australian-headquartered vendor and listing specialities relevant to visitor management.
